object_a.label: wall feature
object_a.description: rectangular decorative wooden sign with text
object_a.long_form_open_description: Rectangular distressed wooden wall sign made of horizontal slats painted in a light tone with darker stenciled letters reading 'BEACH' (or similar beach-themed word); mounted on the left wall near mid-height.
